reviews.review_description: I just started playing yesterday and I already love it. I’ve signed up for the tournament today and I’m excited to play in it. I will take that opportunity to try and get better. This game is the best 10 out of 10.

reviews.review_title: Fun but party mode doesn't work
reviews.review_description: That's it. I tried to play with my wife but after the video we hit the continue button and the game go back to home screen...
There is nobody ever on to battle with

Fun, cool music and announcer, but the culture of  "pay money for upgrades" is aweful. If it was just cosmetic item I wouldn't have cared, but they offer paid upgrades that improve your gear.
Instead of paying with money you can use an in-game currecy, but the rate of acquiring it through gameplay is very very slow, so it is unrealistic to get items in a fun rate without paying money.
Before buying the app I looked at reviews here, and I saw that the creators replied to some people and said that there were no more purchases in the app and it's a one-time purchase. That is a lie.

I would like to say, I did not download the game when it was free, so I paid for it.  And yes, there are still pay to win mechanics if you don't like grinding for currency.  Or the daily free log in gifts like a mobile app.

My biggest gripe is that I compair this game to a game called Sparc which was on PSVR and since has been taken down and delisted.

But that game had a spectator mode where you could wait and watch the match that was going on before you had your turn.

So I have 2 brothers who I like getting to play with but when when the 3rd person joins the room, the screen goes black.  You can hear the sounds that are going on from the other 2 people playing but can't see anything.  Then when the match is over, there is no way to play the winner.....it just let's the 2 playing the option to play again and if one of them leave the room, you can't join in.  Everyone just has to back out or reset their app and start over.  It's where it gets annoying the most right there.

Also big gripe since like I said I play with my 2 brothers, when wanting to play a 2V2 game they should have the option to add a bot, bit NOPE.....you actually have to have 4 people playing at all times.

Just some FYI for the devs, or anyone interested in purchasing the game.
Totally love this game just started to play and I’m hooked epic ✔️

I enjoy this game, it is one of my favs, but when i wanted to play with my little brother, the tutorial was taking too long! There was no way to skip! 😓. Also, he went straight to “Gravity Party” to play with me, and his ID didn’t even show up! It just said: “ID:” then said nothing. Then he tried typing in my ID for a friend request, and it said “something went wrong”. At that point i was exhausted and gave up. Can you please fix these issues? Thanks 🤗😮‍💨😴

I stumbled across this game by accident to be honest but wow glad I did I owned Sparc previously on the PSVR and this has some Sparc vibes to it and this game will give you a pretty good workout played a few games online and always found somebody to play other than online there is plenty to do mini games and a solo career looking forward to future updates to see what they can do with an already good title if your on the fence don’t hesitate just buy it you won’t regret it…

reviews.review_title: What happened to it being free
reviews.review_description: I had this game for 100% free and I don’t play it
couldnt even play online mode because all it was is just a black screen. waited 15 minutes just to play and still was just a black screen.

developer_response.body:
Hey there! You asked, and we listened! 🫡

We’ve made some major changes, and we wanted to make sure you heard about them. As of October 25th, Gravity League is now a straightforward, paid game—just $14.99 with no more transactions required to unlock anything! 🎉

And here’s the cool part: If you downloaded the game before October 25th, you’ve already unlocked everything for free. So, you’re all set—no extra purchases needed. 🤩

We’d love it if you could give the game another shot and consider updating your review. Your voice matters! 🙏🏻

See you on the field,
The Blue Ducks Team 🫶🏼

reviews.review_description: Great game and its good for a casual workout. There are many fun gamemodes possible but you have to pay for them. Not too many players online but its still in app lab. Great customization options to fit your likings. Also different options for each hand for what to hit with. The abilities are a fun way to change up the game and bring more spice in it. Also its very satisfying to hit a perfect ball and it goes straight in the goal. You do really need enough play room to really get into the game, I've hit my roof walls plants and floor a few times (oops...). Overall, definitely worth trying!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the positive review! 

We're delighted you enjoy the game and find it suitable for a casual workout. We appreciate your feedback on the in-game purchases, and it's something we're carefully considering as we develop the game further.

We're glad you appreciate the customization options and find satisfaction in the different hand options and abilities. Apologies for any unintended collisions with your surroundings; we recommend ensuring a safe play area.

Your support means a lot to us! If you have more thoughts or suggestions, feel free to share. And if you enjoy the game, consider leaving a 5-star review to help us continue improving. Join our Discord community [https://discord.gg/gravityleague] to stay connected with other players. Happy gaming, and thanks for being part of the Gravity League community!

reviews.review_description:
I’m really enjoying this take on air hockey meeting racketball, and Gravity Legue is absolutely essential to your fitness collection.  You will be moving constantly in every direction!  The solo mode is very deep, offering leveled-up paths with multiple bosses to have you earn store merch.  You can also find other online players via solo, and all of these playable options really help you to level up your gear, environment and costume.  The DLC is absolutely worthy to unlock a greater set of multiplayer options, and you’ll also gain access to some fun play environments with more advanced strategies.

All this being said, the play boundary really deserves to be a decently large space, and the specific moves required (ball coming to corners) will lead to either missed goals or broken furniture if attempting in a cramped room.  

Although there are are a lot of play modes including tournament and special environments, I’m really not feeling any true variation across the board.  It’s still the base game (a fantastic one) just dressed up slightly differently.  There’s one mode that I hope is expanded on, and that’s the duck challenge; it’s highly creative but its play is limited to in-game currency which was a slight letdown.

Lastly, the store items contain some good variety, but it’s unclear why any one item is advantageous over another aside from aesthetics.  It would be great if certain items were shown to be a power up advantage, for example.

An awesome entry for VR sports, and Gravity League is easily one of my top go-tos!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your detailed and positive review of Gravity League! 

We're thrilled to hear that you're enjoying the unique combination of air hockey and racketball elements in the game, and we appreciate your insights on various aspects of the gameplay.

It's fantastic to know that Gravity League has become an essential part of your fitness collection. We put a lot of effort into creating a deep solo mode with various challenges and bosses, and we're glad to see that it's resonating with players like you.

We also appreciate your thoughts on the various play modes and environments. Your feedback on the duck challenge mode and in-game currency is valuable, and we'll certainly consider ways to expand and enhance such creative challenges.

Regarding store items and their advantages, your suggestion about certain items offering power-up advantages is insightful. We'll explore ways to provide more clarity on the functionality of different items in the store.

For ongoing discussions, updates, and to connect with other players, we invite you to join our Discord community [https://discord.gg/gravityleague].

Thank you for your support and for making Gravity League one of your top go-to VR sports games!

reviews.review_description: If you enjoy any type of sport/fitness this is definitely the game for you. I only started playing a few days ago but I’m obsessed. It’s one of those games you can just jump on and have a quick match or spend hours trying to get in a higher division. It’s a no brainier really as it’s a free game and I guarantee you will enjoy it.

developer_response.body:
Hey there! You asked, and we listened! 🫡

We’ve made some major changes, and we wanted to make sure you heard about them. As of October 25th, Gravity League is now a straightforward, paid game—just $14.99 with no more transactions required to unlock anything! 🎉

And here’s the cool part: If you downloaded the game before October 25th, you’ve already unlocked everything for free. So, you’re all set—no extra purchases needed. 🤩

We’d love it if you could give the game another shot and consider updating your review. Your voice matters! 🙏🏻

See you on the field,
The Blue Ducks Team 🫶🏼

reviews.review_description: This game makes great use of the virtual reality ability to defy physics and turns it into a competitive e-sports game.There is so much fun to be had deceiveing or outplaying an opponent with a variety of different abilities and gloves. There are also multiple game modes to try out. It still has its gripes with some things but it has a solid foundation with plenty of room to improve upon. I must warn you that it does involve lots of movement and I ended up hitting my lights three times. If you have the chance do try it out.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your fantastic feedback! 

We're thrilled that you're enjoying the unique experience Gravity League offers, turning traditional air-hockey into a dynamic and competitive VR e-sports game. Your insights are valuable, and we're continuously working to enhance the game further. 

Just a friendly reminder, if you haven't already, consider joining our Discord community [discord.gg/gravityleague] to engage with fellow players, share experiences, and stay updated on exciting developments. 

Keep having a blast on the Gravity field!

reviews.review_description: When I played this game first it was okay and then I played more and I tried to upgrade my gloves and everything else but I have to buy the season pass in order to do so.

developer_response.body:
Update 1.08.23 - 
Thank you for your review! We've been working hard to improve the game, adding all-new classes that provide unique playstyles as well as powerups that spice up the gameplay in a big way! We have also removed the season pass and anything resembling a paywall to give all players a fair shared experience. We would love it if you could please give it a try again and let us know if it feels any better :)

reviews.review_title: It's a great fitness game for free!!!
reviews.review_description:
Gameplay is so smooth......nice graphic....and it will keep you moving and moving!!!

Multiplayer is next to come so there will be endless fun!!

Yeah...you can pay the to get extra upgrade...but is totally up to you! Considering what you get for free....this is really a good game that each Quest owner should install on the headset!!!5 stars for me!

I tend to jump right into the single player modes to get a feel of the game and controls before jumping into online gameplay and Gravity League offers a lot of variety for learning while keeping things fun. There’s lots of customization options. I did initially run into some game-breaking issues while trying to play an online match. After a quick re-install of the game I had a much better time, but sadly still ran into issues midway through a match. There are some minor annoyances, like the announcer voice quickly gets old after the same phrases start repeating but has a dedicated volume slider, so it’s not a big deal. Overall though the game so far is a lot of fun and with time and continued developer support I know this game can earn a top spot in my list of competitive online games.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback on Gravity League! 

We're glad you're enjoying the variety and customization options in the game. 

We apologize for any inconvenience you faced during your online match, and we appreciate your patience. We're constantly working on improving the game, and your input helps us refine the experience. 

Regarding the announcer voice, we'll take note of your feedback for future adjustments. 

If you haven't already, consider joining our Discord community [discord.gg/gravityleague] to stay updated and connect with other players.

Your support is crucial to the game's growth, and we'd be honored if you'd consider updating your rating to 5 stars as we continue to push the experience forward.

We look forward to seeing you on the field!

reviews.review_title: Great fun for air hockey fans
reviews.review_description:
First let me say it's a lot of fun as a recovering air hockey fan, you now get the same feeling in 3D. The physics are great and speed could be increased and it would make it more intense.

The field is a bit bigger than I expected meaning that to reach the corners you really have to go there, and I'm tall, so wondering how that would work for a kid, maybe it knows your height :)

I also wonder if the anti aliasing could be a bit improved on the surrounding wall mesh, at least for the Q3 players?

Finally the voice acting and the pay to win aspect of the interface is a bit over the top, but being an older millennial I might not be the main target audience. I also think the lobby could use some graphical improvements to make it more attractive, it's too grey with toon-like characters clashing a bit.

So nitpicking apart, it's a fun casual competitive game that I'll definitely play again, once more people are available online to try a match against humans!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your awesome review! :)

We're thrilled to hear you're having fun and appreciate your insights. 

We'll look into improving anti-aliasing for a smoother visual experience, especially for our Q3 players. Your thoughts on the voice acting, interface, and lobby graphics are valuable, and we'll take them into account for future updates to enhance the overall experience.

We're glad you find it a fun casual competitive game, and we look forward to more players joining online matches. If you have more suggestions or want to discuss further, feel free to join our Discord community [https://discord.gg/gravityleague]. 

Happy gaming, and thanks for being part of the Gravity League community!
